snapshot_ref.source: portfolio_snapshots row 27 — the latest snapshot as of 12:30 tick

session_context.delta_vs_12_00_tick: MATERIAL RECOVERY. Total value ₹996,514.20 → ₹998,653.85 (+₹2,139.65, +0.21% in 30 min) — the strongest positive tick of the Day-3 session. Daily P&L -₹3,488.75 → -₹1,380.85 (+₹2,107.90 improvement). Buffer to -1% findings trigger WIDENED ₹6,479 → ₹8,606 (+₹2,127). Four offsetting moves under the surface: (i) MAHABANK recovered -6.44% → -6.13% (+31 bps, continued the 11:42→12:00 reversal), (ii) AUBANK firmed +0.08% → +0.69% (+61 bps — triangle gain-leg still FALSE but trending back), (iii) PNBHOUSING extended gain +4.01% → +4.41% (+40 bps), (iv) HINDUNILVR quietly widened -2.66% → -2.87% (-21 bps, the single name bucking the recovery tape). No new trades, no OPEN orders.

MAHABANK.note: Continues recovering: -6.44% (11:42) → -6.13% (12:13), +31 bps on top of the prior +20 bps — cumulative +51 bps recovery from the 11:13 low of -6.64%. Still past the 11:00 -6% fire line (13 bps) but the trajectory slope is cleanly positive. SL ₹75.00 intact; LTP ₹76.50 is 2.00% to stop.

PNBHOUSING.note: Further strengthened (+4.01% → +4.41%, +40 bps). Largest absolute gainer on the book at +₹3,472 MTM. Continues absorbing single-name drags.

AUBANK.note: Triangle partial re-heat: gain leg from +0.08% → +0.69% (+61 bps). Still FALSE (below +1% gain threshold) so triangle remains 1-of-3, but the cooling trend of the 10:00→12:00 window reversed this tick. Grandfathered oversize ~3.62 pp above 0.15 cap.

HINDUNILVR.note: Continues to widen: -2.66% (11:42) → -2.87% (12:13), another -21 bps on top of the -133 bps from the prior hour. Still well inside -4% watch threshold (113 bps buffer). Only holding bucking the recovery tape.

NTPC.note: Marginally improved -0.98% → -0.80% (+18 bps). Single-name Power survivor.

trigger_a_book_below_neg_1_pct.delta_vs_12_00: Buffer WIDENED ₹6,479 → ₹8,606 (+₹2,127). Direction reversed — the narrowing of the 10:30→12:00 window is now a widening.
trigger_a_book_below_neg_1_pct.note: Book at -0.14%, 86 bps inside trigger band. Drift-rate arithmetic this session: 10:30→11:00 narrowed ₹2,701, 11:00→11:30 narrowed ₹663, 11:30→12:00 narrowed ₹93, 12:00→12:30 WIDENED ₹2,127. First positive tick of the day at the book level.

trigger_d_bfsi_above_0_37.delta_vs_12_00: +0.10 pp (compositional — BFSI marked up: AUBANK +61 bps, PNBHOUSING +40 bps, MAHABANK +31 bps)
trigger_d_bfsi_above_0_37.note: Buffer narrowed slightly from 1.06 pp to 0.96 pp purely via MTM firming across all three BFSI names — there was NO admission. The d-trigger is a capital-share metric, and mark-up of existing holdings can drift it toward the threshold even without new buys. Still inside.

trigger_e_mahabank_below_neg_6_pct.note: Already fired at 11:00 (min_sl_pct 0.005 → 0.01). Current mark -6.13% is cumulative +51 bps recovery from the 11:13 low of -6.64%. Does NOT re-fire.

trigger_e_next_mahabank_below_neg_7_pct.note: Buffer widened by 26 bps vs 12:00 (from -6.44%). Armed watch: if MAHABANK LTP ≤ ₹75.80, consider max_sl_pct 0.04 → 0.03.

trigger_e_extreme_mahabank_below_neg_8_p.note: Buffer widened 156 bps → 187 bps. Not near HIGH elevation.

trigger_f_strategy_silence_past_2h.note: Silence clock at 1h 47m post 10:43:24 ADANIPOWER SELL. At 12:43:24 (13 min away) the 2h threshold trips. However, no spec-hard lever action is tied to the 2h silence alone — it only supplies the 3rd leg of the composite HIGH meta-trigger, and the other two legs (book<-0.5%, MAHABANK<-5.5%) need to co-fire. Currently only MAHABANK fires that 2nd leg; book is at -0.14%, positive-direction this tick.

trigger_meta_high_composite.note: 1-of-3 (unchanged vs 12:00). The silence leg will flip TRUE at 12:43:24 making it 2-of-3, but the book leg is moving AWAY from its threshold this tick (book at -0.14%, 36 bps inside -0.5%). Composite HIGH not justified.

trigger_aubank_triangle.note: Triangle 1-of-3. Gain leg warmed +0.08% → +0.69% — still FALSE (below +1%) but 31 bps from triggering; unacted leg FALSE (strategy active today — 2 SELLs); oversize leg persists at 18.62% (grandfathered drift, +0.08 pp vs 12:00 via MTM warming). If AUBANK crosses +1% gain on current trajectory, triangle would become 2-of-3 (gain + oversize). Watch.

trigger_hindunilvr_watch.note: Continued widening: -2.66% → -2.87% (-21 bps this tick; cumulative -154 bps from 10:43's -1.33%). Single name bucking the recovery tape. Pre-spec watch: if pnl_pct ≤ -4%, tighten max_sl_pct 0.04 → 0.03 (per 12:00 watch_triggers). Current buffer 113 bps; slowing drift-rate suggests no-trip this tick but trajectory is directional.

findings: BOOK MATERIALLY RECOVERED: total value ₹996,514 → ₹998,654 (+₹2,140, +0.21%) in 30 min — the strongest positive tick of Day 3. Daily P&L improved -₹3,489 → -₹1,381 (+₹2,108). Buffer to -1% findings trigger WIDENED ₹6,479 → ₹8,606. The 10:30-through-12:00 narrowing trend has reversed.

MAHABANK continued recovering: -6.44% (11:42) → -6.13% (12:13), +31 bps — cumulative +51 bps off the 11:13 low of -6.64%. Still past the 11:00 min_sl_pct fire line (13 bps past -6%) but the slope is cleanly positive for two consecutive ticks. Buffer to the pre-spec -7% next-fire line widened to 87 bps; buffer to the -8% HIGH-elevation extreme widened to 187 bps.

AUBANK triangle partial re-heat: gain leg warmed +0.08% → +0.69% (+61 bps), approaching the +1% trip threshold but not yet there. Triangle remains 1-of-3 (oversize only); watching for a potential 2-of-3 flip (gain + oversize) if AUBANK crosses +1% on the current slope. No AUBANK-specific action unless triangle hits 2-of-3.

PNBHOUSING strengthened further: +4.01% → +4.41%, +40 bps. Largest absolute gainer on the book at +₹3,472 MTM. Together with AUBANK's firming, this drove BFSI's capital share up +0.10 pp via pure MTM (no admissions) — a mechanically benign move vs. the 10-pp spikes that would require tightening.

HINDUNILVR continues to widen: -2.66% → -2.87% (-21 bps). The sole name bucking the recovery tape. Drift-rate has decelerated (prior hour -133 bps → this 30-min -21 bps), so likely no -4% watch-line trip this tick, but trajectory is directional. Position is small (4.61% capital, ~0.13% portfolio risk) so not actionable solo — becomes actionable only if coincides with a book break below -0.5% or a MAHABANK re-extension.

BFSI cluster 36.04% of capital (+0.10 pp vs 12:00, 0.96 pp buffer to 37% d-trigger). Mechanism: pure MTM firming across all three names (AUBANK +61 bps, PNBHOUSING +40 bps, MAHABANK +31 bps). No BFSI admission; the newly-opened admission surface continues unused at 1h 47m.

Strategy silence clock at 1h 47m since ADANIPOWER SELL (10:43:24). At 12:43:24 — 13 minutes from this tick — the 2h threshold trips, flipping the silence leg of the composite HIGH meta-trigger to TRUE (from 1-of-3 to 2-of-3). However, the book-negative leg is trending AWAY from its -0.5% threshold this tick (book at -0.14%, 36 bps inside). Composite HIGH would still be 2-of-3 — not firing — post the 12:43 flip.

Deployment 67.51% of capital (+0.07 pp vs 12:00 purely via MTM firming on the holdings side — cash unchanged). Admission surface remains open at 2.49 pp. Opened since 10:43, now ageing 1h 47m without use. Cap is not binding.
AUBANK 18.62% grandfathered drift above 0.15 per-name cap — unchanged pattern since Day-1 EOD, still not retractable by tightening; +0.11 pp widening this tick is pure MTM.
Daily P&L -₹1,380.85 (-0.138% of portfolio) — book is now inside the -0.2% 'essentially-flat' band. Loss-gate buffer ₹28,579; findings-trigger (-1%) buffer ₹8,606. Both widened materially this tick.
hold_rationale: No numeric overrides changed this tick. (1) No spec-hard trigger fired: book at -0.14% (inside -1%, and IMPROVING), MAHABANK at -6.13% (past the 11:00 lever but that fired, +87 bps to -7% next-fire, +187 bps to -8% HIGH-elevation — both buffers WIDENED from last tick), BFSI 36.04% (inside 37%, +0.10 pp via MTM only — no admission so no trigger), strategy silence 1h 47m (inside 2h), HINDUNILVR -2.87% (inside -4% watch line, 113 bps buffer). (2) Book-level direction-of-travel reversed from NEGATIVE to POSITIVE: daily P&L improved +₹2,108 in 30 min. Tightening loss-gate or confidence knobs on a recovering book is counter-signal — the system's discipline is to tighten when the picture deteriorates and HOLD when it improves. (3) Admission surface is open (2.49 pp) and has been unused for 1h 47m — tightening max_deployed_pct further now would re-close the door the strategy earned via 2 SELLs, undoing the intended incentive (SELL → freed cash → quality-gated BUY). (4) The AUBANK triangle is PARTIALLY re-heating (gain leg warmed 61 bps) but still 1-of-3; no pre-spec lever fires until 2-of-3. (5) HINDUNILVR widening is noted but drift-rate decelerated and no individual threshold tripped. (6) The strategy-silence 2h flip at 12:43 is imminent but not a standalone lever trigger — only contributes to the composite HIGH (which still needs the book-negative leg, which is moving the wrong way for HIGH). Disciplined HOLD is the correct action on a recovering, no-firing-trigger tick.

watch_triggers_next_tick.if_strategy_silence_exceeds_2h_at_12_43_: Composite HIGH meta-trigger becomes 2-of-3 (silence + MAHABANK). Still not HIGH (book-negative leg trending away). Increase monitoring cadence, flag that the opened admission surface is ageing 2h+ without use.
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_MAHABANK_pnl_pct_le_-7.00 (price ≤ 75: Consider tightening max_sl_pct 0.04 → 0.03. Current buffer 87 bps.
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_MAHABANK_pnl_pct_le_-8.00 (price ≤ 74: FIRE: elevate risk_level to HIGH AND flag strategy_reviewer for same-day intervention. Current buffer 187 bps (widened).
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_book_daily_pnl_pct_le_-1.0: FIRE: daily_loss_limit_pct 0.03 → 0.025. Current buffer ₹8,606 (widened +₹2,127 this tick).
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_book_daily_pnl_pct_le_-2.0: FIRE: daily_loss_limit_pct 0.03 → 0.02 AND risk_level to HIGH.
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_HINDUNILVR_pnl_pct_le_-4.0: NEW WATCH: tighten max_sl_pct 0.04 → 0.03. Current buffer 113 bps; drift-rate decelerated this tick.
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_BFSI_pct_of_total_ge_37.0_via_admissi: FIRE: min_confidence 0.60 → 0.65. Current buffer 0.96 pp (narrowed 0.10 pp via MTM). If an admission occurs that adds ≥0.9 pp of BFSI weight, trigger would fire.
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_BFSI_pct_of_total_ge_37.0_via_MTM_onl: DO NOT auto-fire min_confidence — tightening admission-gate on MTM drift with no admission is theatrical. Re-assess whether the 37% line needs a separate MTM-drift lever (candidate: max_position_pct 0.15 → 0.12 if sustained MTM drift pushes BFSI > 37% for 2+ ticks without admission).
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_AUBANK_pnl_pct_ge_+1.00 AND no strate: Triangle becomes 2-of-3 (gain + oversize). Watch but don't lever-fire — the unacted leg requires strategy silence to be wall-to-wall, and today's 2 SELLs disprove that on the session timescale. If the 12:43 silence trip occurs AND AUBANK crosses +1%, then triangle flips 3-of-3 and max_position_pct 0.15 → 0.12 becomes actionable.
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_new_BUY_through_opened_admission_surf: Verify: (i) min_confidence ≥ 0.60, (ii) position size ≤ 15%, (iii) SL band within [1.0%, 4.0%], (iv) no 4th BFSI unless sub-36% post-admission, (v) no Power re-add (cluster just resolved). Fire (d) pre-emptively if BUY is BFSI.
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_strategy_executes_MAHABANK_SELL: Risk_level candidate for LOW step-down. Would realize the -6% breach (~-₹6,000 realized depending on fill) and remove the single-name drag.
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_strategy_executes_AUBANK_TRIM_below_1: Risk_level candidate for LOW step-down. Resolves the longest-standing grandfathered structural breach.

housekeeping.risk_config_state: Unchanged — no override added, removed, or modified this tick. Changelog untouched.
housekeeping.next_scheduled_tick: 13:00 IST — watch: (i) strategy silence 2h trip at 12:43:24 (composite HIGH goes 2-of-3), (ii) MAHABANK recovery continuation (two-tick positive slope — does it hold or reverse?), (iii) AUBANK approaching triangle 2-of-3 if +1% crossed, (iv) HINDUNILVR widening vs -4% watch line, (v) BFSI MTM drift vs 37% d-line (now only 96 bps buffer).
